# Ivory Arc Travels
> Private luxury travel atelier for North India. Bespoke heritage and spiritual journeys — private vehicles, transparent pricing, no commission-driven shopping stops.

Ivory Arc Travels designs fully private, customized journeys across Delhi NCR, Rajasthan, Uttar Pradesh, Uttarakhand, Punjab, Himachal Pradesh and Jammu. Not a package seller or OTA.

## How pricing works
Hotels are billed at actual cost plus a clearly stated 10% coordination fee. Estimates are indicative and billed in INR.

## How to plan
- IVY Estimator (/plan): an indicative journey estimate in minutes.
- IVY on WhatsApp: an AI travel concierge; human specialists assist with complex itineraries.

## Registered
Registered Indian tour operator. GST 09AYIPT0745R2ZH.
